source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for branching workflow UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual labels, trees, and dependency states.
layout: Precise 8px workflow grids, branching separators, mist surfaces, bark texture, and clear dependency dashboards.

prompts.label: Transparent coral fungus motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only coral fungus branches, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A coral fungus cluster with delicate branching forms, coral peach tips, bark brown base shadows, mist grey wet highlights, natural irregular branch structure, and crisp fungal texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full branching cluster without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves peach branch color, wet forest texture, and fine tips.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no forest background, no moss bed, no coral reef, no underwater scene.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Coral Fungus" derived from coral fungus branches. The composition must be a landscape 16:9 board, wider than tall, not square and not portrait.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from coral peach branches, bark brown base, mist grey wet highlights, damp taupe shadows, and branching wet forest structure in coral fungus branches.
Canvas: high-resolution landscape 16:9 board, wide dashboard composition, crisp readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Coral Fungus, Coral Fungus Branches, Palette, Typography, Multilingual Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Show workflow product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style workflow design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, mist grey surfaces, branching separators, bark texture, clear dependency and task hierarchy.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: coral peach, branch tip, bark brown, mist grey, fog surface, damp taupe, moss signal, and wet bark ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Coral Fungus".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Coral Fungus design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme. The composition must be a landscape 16:9 board, wider than tall, not square and not portrait.
Reference use: This dark design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme together with the light board. Use coral fungus branches and the light-mode Morphous Coral Fungus board language as references. Preserve the branching palette roles, workflow component language, branch separators, wet bark texture, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: high-resolution landscape 16:9 board, wide dashboard composition, crisp readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Coral Fungus, Coral Fungus Branches, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Multilingual Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from wet bark ink and wet forest, readable text from mist grey, primary accents from coral peach, secondary accents from bark brown, highlights from branch tip, status from moss signal, subtle branching texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Coral Fungus".
